title: Track TensorMap readers and derive WAR dependencies
goal: Extend TensorMap to track live reader accesses and automatically derive overlapping reader-to-writer WAR edges without serializing independent readers.
context: Preserve the public orchestration API and existing OUTPUT_EXISTING overwrite semantics; keep a2a3 host_build_graph, a2a3/a5 tensormap_and_ringbuffer, host access waits, dep_gen_replay, and DFX behavior equivalent. Account for TensorMap pool, bucket-chain, arena, and fanin growth.

acceptance_criteria.description: The W0(inout X), R0(input X), W1(inout X) regression derives R0-to-W1 and the issue #1306 reproducer produces correct output on supported variants.

verification.value: Inspect the captured/replayed dependency graph for R0-to-W1 and attach passing #1306 regression output for each supported runtime variant.

acceptance_criteria.description: Multiple pure readers remain mutually independent; writers depend on every overlapping live reader, while disjoint or retired readers add no dependency.
Partial-overlap, full-coverage retirement, cross-ring WAR, and set_tensor_data waiting for pure INPUT readers are covered by regression tests.

verification.value: Review the added tests and their passing output for partial/full overlap, cross-ring, retirement, and host-write cases.

acceptance_criteria.description: Before default enablement, report TensorMap chain length, pool high-water mark, arena usage, orchestration latency, and fanin spill impact against the pre-change baseline.

verification.value: Review an attached before/after benchmark and DFX report containing every named metric.
